# imageShape

**Instance Property**

The aspect ratio of the item’s image.

## Declaration

```swift
var imageShape: TVTopShelfSectionedItem.ImageShape { get set }
```

## Discussion

Use this property to specify the shape of the image you use for the item. The image shape determines the dimensions to use when creating the image. For a list of possible values, see [doc://com.apple.tvservices/documentation/TVServices/TVTopShelfSectionedItem/ImageShape-swift.enum].

## Setting the Image Shape

- **TVTopShelfSectionedItem.ImageShape**: Constants indicating the aspect ratio of an image.
